race.comment: It looks another great option for exciting filly TRES MAGNIFIQUE (9). She was close up in some good races last time in and has gone on with it this campaign, walking in first up at Bendigo before beating a strong BM70 field comfortably last time. More depth again here but she's the one with more to come and she'll be well fancied to continue her winning ways. SALUTED (14) resumes. She's a speedy sort of filly who is suited to the 1000m here from a low draw. She can look to keep the favourite out and cling on. SUN SETTING (5) resumes. She's a consistent mare with a sharp turn of foot who can look to slot in off the speed and get over the top of a good speed late. LEGACY BAY (11) is consistent but finding it tough to win. Fresh for this and back to 1000m, she'll be finishing hard. ONE HARD LADY (3) is going well and could give a sight from the low draw.
